{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Pillar of Sunset
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Pillar of Sunset]] is a column of smoldering red and black stone.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Pillar of Sunset]] has a red-and-black marbled surface and pulses with living heat.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
